# 🚀 Deployment Guide

Follow these steps to deploy the **DutchStay Rentals** application to Firebase Hosting.

### 1. Build the Application
Generate the production-ready `dist` folder:
```bash
npm run build
```

### 2. Deploy to Firebase
Deploy the build to the configured Firebase project (`findyournexthome-amsterdam`):
```bash
npx firebase-tools deploy
```

> [!NOTE]
> Ensure you are logged into Firebase via the CLI (`npx firebase-tools login`) before running the deploy command.
